name: Atopic Dermatitis Algorithm
description: This test case evaluates identification of atopic dermatitis cases using a complex phenotyping algorithm that requires either: (1) patients ≥60 days old with 2+ visits coded for atopic dermatitis plus 2+ prescriptions for AD-related medications, or (2) patients ≥60 days old with 3+ visits coded for atopic dermatitis. The test also validates exclusion of patients with confounding conditions like immune disorders, other skin conditions, or malignancies.
prompt: Find patients who have been diagnosed with atopic dermatitis and either have multiple visits with this diagnosis or have received appropriate medications for treating atopic dermatitis.
